structured_output.result:
Conceptual documentation inventory written to `_ceremony_executions/OBR/20-REPO-ANALYSIS-01/repository-structure-analysis-conceptual-docs.yaml` and committed as f755096.

Key findings:
- Root README + 7 root-level docs (CHANGELOG, CONTRIBUTING, LICENSE, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md stub, MIGRATION_GUIDE, QWEN3_TUNING, RELEASING).
- 6 doc sections (operations/ with 2 files; module/test READMEs in chunkhound/providers/embeddings, chunkhound/autodoc/assets, tests/fixtures, tests/manual, tests/unit/research).
- readme_count = 7; github_pages_url = https://chunkhound.github.io (primary user docs hosted externally).
- No in-repo docs/ directory, no architecture/glossary/field-guide/user-manual/API specs.
- No AI-generation signals observed on individual documents.
- Totals: 16 files, 2607 lines; most recent doc commit 2026-04-15 (51f7652).
